response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep hardware/AI-accelerator expertise — SoC/IP modeling, deep neural network optimization, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. Background is overwhelmingly application-layer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang microservices, GIS platforms) with no demonstrated work on AI accelerators, performance modeling of silicon, or chip architecture.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput services)
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on engineering tooling
Long track record as a senior IC with cross-domain adaptability
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or chip architecture experience
No deep-learning training/inference optimization or AI-accelerator workload analysis
No GPU, SIMD, or MIMD architecture background relevant to the role

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU / SIMD / MIMD architecture background
